title: Rikki Don't Lose That Number
why_this_song: Rikki Don't Lose That Number by Steely Dan (1974) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Send it off in a letter to yourself
I have a friend in town
We can go out driving on

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "don't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rikki" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rikki" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I have a friend in town

exercises.prompt_en: "Rikki Don't Lose That Number" was released in 1974. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Rikki Don't Lose That Number" foi lançada em 1974. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Rikki Don't Lose That Number" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Rikki Don't Lose That Number" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Steely Dan one question about "Rikki Don't Lose That Number", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Steely Dan sobre "Rikki Don't Lose That Number", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Rikki Don't Lose That Number" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Rikki Don't Lose That Number" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
